description: Style Note German brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity. This T-shirt from Puma is the kind you can't have enough of. This piece's colour and stylish cut is an off-duty must have. Pair this piece with fitted denims and bright canvas shoes. Product Details Black polo neck t-shirt with a spread collar, chest button placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and branding on the left sleeve, patch pocket on the left chest with Ducati logo printed on it and a vented hem Material and Care 100% Cotton Wash separately in cool water Do not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry clean Line dry Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
